Research oauth specifications and use those as an iron clad guarantee, do not violate the spec. Ensure strict adherence to the spec both in letter and spirit 
Conduct an adversarial review before presenting the plan. Ask me any clarifying questions necessary to determine appropriate design direction or trade offs
Plan to update relevant documentation

[2] user: conduct an adversarial review on this plan and its design decisions. revise the plan to address any findings

once fully implemented, use [$improve-codebase-architecture](/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot/.agents/skills/improve-codebase-architecture/SKILL.md) to identify improvements and continue to impleemnt

use domain modelling

[295] tool apply_patch call: *** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /private/tmp/cyspbot-fly-oidc-pr.md
+## Summary
+
+- add a Fly.io OIDC provider package for trusted issuer construction, claim validation, and Fly Machine principal derivation
+- extend the token exchange Worker to verify configured Fly org issuers and apply Token Policy before GitHub App token issuance
+- document Fly Machine behavior, deny-by-default policy, OAuth token exchange boundaries, and runtime configuration
+
+## Impact
+
+Fly Machine callers can exchange OIDC subject tokens for GitHub App installation tokens only when `FLY_OIDC_ORG_SLUGS` trusts the issuing Fly org and Token Policy explicitly allows the Fly principal, repository resource, and permission request.
+
+GitHub Actions behavior remains supported, including legacy policy rules without an explicit provider tag.
+
+## Validation
+
+- `node --run check`
+- manual code review of the Fly OIDC, authentication, token policy, docs, and test changes
*** End Patch
